Pages limits

Below are limits observed by the Cloudflare Free plan. Source: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/platform/limits/

Service Offer type Card required Paid dependencies Builds per month Concurrent builds Custom domains Files File size Header rules Redirects Projects per account Exhaustion behaviour
Cloudflare Pages always_free No No 500 1 build at a time 100 20,000 25 MiB 100 2,100 100 deployment_blocked
